items.caption:
A vibrant arcade bar, bathed in the glow of neon lights. the bar is named "1up arcade bar - lodo" as indicated by the text. the floor is a stark contrast to the colorful arcade games, which are neatly arranged in rows. 

in the foreground, a green arcade machine stands out with its "flappy bird" game, inviting players to take flight. the background reveals more arcade games, their colorful graphics and bright lights adding to the lively atmosphere. the walls are adorned with posters, adding character to the space. the ceiling, painted black, provides a stark contrast to the colorful arcade games below. the overall scene is a nostalgic throwback to the classic arcade experience.
